creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Approved by the maintainer via e-mail:
> I confirmed id=262167 patch with FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE.
> 
> I think it's a great job !
> 
> Would you please take on the role of maintainer?
> I myself couldn't continue due to personal reasons. 
> 
> Best regards,
> 
> Kouichi Hirabayashi
